<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="8yJtYdtsYEM4XKAGVO4p" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-546" dy="-175" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="Kubernetes 集群架构全景图" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="400" x="350" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="master_container" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="Control Plane (Master Node)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="340" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_server" parent="master_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="API Server
kube-apiserver
(集群统一入口, REST API)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="20" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="etcd" parent="master_container" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="etcd
(分布式 KV 存储, 集群状态)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="300" x="20" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scheduler" parent="master_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=11;" value="Scheduler
kube-scheduler
(决定 Pod 调度到哪台 Node)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="20" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="controller_manager" parent="master_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=11;" value="Controller Manager
kube-controller-manager
(维持期望状态: 副本数/探针/扩缩容)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="20" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloud_cm" parent="master_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E0E0E0;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="Cloud Controller Manager
(对接云厂商: 负载均衡/存储/防火墙)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="20" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker_container" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="Worker Node (运行 Pod 的机器)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="340" x="450" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kubelet" parent="worker_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="kubelet
(Node 上唯一的守护进程
监听 API Server, 启停容器)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="300" x="20" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kube_proxy" parent="worker_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#E64A19;fontSize=11;" value="kube-proxy
(网络代理, 维护 iptables/IPVS 规则
实现 Service 负载均衡)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="300" x="20" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="container_runtime" parent="worker_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=11;" value="Container Runtime
(containerd / Docker
